sheet_title: Review AI tool access before applying changes.

requester.requester_label: AI patch planner requests authority to read and apply the reviewed patch.

authority_owner.source_label: Shell-owned AI apply review; the model cannot grant itself authority.

policy_lock.lock_explanation: User choice controls whether the AI tool may read or write in the selected scope.

target_scope.target_label: Current root only; no full-workspace widening.

grant_scope_options.label: This session only; expires on restart or basis drift.

target_scope.remembered_scope_consequence: Once-only grants expire after this action; session scope can be revoked from Trust & Permissions.
target_scope.revocation_route_label: Open Trust & Permissions to revoke remembered AI tool approvals.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Read files and search results in the current root.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: The AI tool must read context to prepare an exact patch and validation plan.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Assemble context for the reviewed change set.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if the requested read scope widens beyond the current root.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, the AI tool can still explain using only user-provided text and metadata-safe summaries.

capability_groups.requested_access_label: Write the reviewed patch to files in the current root.
capability_groups.why_needed_label: Applying the patch requires file writes under a shell-issued authority ticket.
capability_groups.purpose_label: Apply the reviewed patch with checkpoint/undo support.
capability_groups.reconsent_trigger_label: Re-consent is required if the AI tool requests broader write scope or new side effects.
capability_groups.denied_by_default_behavior_label: If denied, the patch remains a draft and no file writes occur.

reduced_mode_options.label: Review diff without applying
reduced_mode_options.behavior_summary: Keeps the reviewed patch as a local draft; the AI tool may explain but cannot write files.

transitive_scope_disclosure.summary_label: No dependency or connector transitive expansion applies; requested scope is limited to the current root.

remembered_approvals.revocation_route_label: Revoke from Trust & Permissions → AI tools.

approval_path.host_flow_explanation: No platform host flow is required for local file read/write gating.
approval_path.browser_or_device_step_explanation: No browser/device step is required for this local review.

sheet_actions.label: Apply reviewed patch to current root
